capability.summary: Draft a BMAD capability pack from local PostgreSQL evidence refs without live database access.

acceptanceCriteria.statement: Forge emits deterministic draft artifacts from local evidence files.
Generated capability-request.json can be verified offline when its declarations are valid.
PostgreSQL evidence records only POSTGRES_URL=set|unset and never stores live schema, sample rows, query results, or connection strings.
Generated customization-draft.toml is draft authoring only and is routed through bmad-customize before use.
